description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly dark metallic body accented by subtle green highlights along its length. The receiver and barrel are integrated into a single, streamlined form, with a prominent rectangular barrel extending forward. A pistol grip is mounted beneath the receiver, providing ergonomic handling, while the rear section is squared off, lacking a traditional shoulder stock. The trigger guard is compact and rounded, closely hugging the trigger area for protection. The overall appearance suggests a modern, tactical shotgun suitable for urban environments, with minimal external embellishments and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern, angular shotgun with a dark metallic finish, green accents, and a pistol grip, designed for tactical use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, rectangular barrel opening and the compact, streamlined profile.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the shotgun, green accent lines, pistol grip, and squared rear section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the squared-off back and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the grip and barrel details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, rectangular profile with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: compact, rounded trigger guard closely fitted around the trigger
